title: eDNA extraction with kaneka
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"44kgt","text":"We used the Kaneka Simple DNA Extraction Kit version 2 (Kaneka) for on-site DNA extraction from Sterivex. We injected 500 µl of Solution A of the kit into the Sterivex and shook it by hand for 1 min. We collected the Solution A buffer in the Sterivex by connecting the syringe with the connecting tube. We added 70 µl of Solution B into the collected Solution A buffer in a 1.5-ml microtube and centrifuged (~2,000 g) with a portable centrifuge for 3 min. We collected 200 µl of the supernatant solution.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":415,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"1p3pb","text":"stervix sample","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"con3g","text":"カネカ簡易DNA抽出キット Version 2","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6q90h","text":"1.5ml tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"97sit","text":"50ml tube","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ag66v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2j7tb","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Inject 250 µL of A buffer into the Sterivex , 00:01:00 shake and rotate .
Put Sterivex into 50ml tube and secured for centrifugation 5000 rpm, °C, 5 minutes
Add 40 µL of B buffer to the 1.5ml tube.
Remove the liquid from the inlet and put into the 1.5ml tube.
